skills.label: Skill usage
skills.blurb: How to apply regin's skills & workflows (goal-verified, ui-ux, topic-router…) — usage lessons, not the code that implements them. Enter for 'which skill fits this task' or 'how do I use skill X'.
skills.intent: Cross-cutting lessons on using regin's skills and workflows effectively.

skill-goal-verified.label: goal-verified loop
skill-goal-verified.blurb: Pin a falsifiable bar → build → STOP → independent adversarial verify + machine gates → commit. Includes the two recall arms (preflight flat recall vs memory-tree-nav).
skill-goal-verified.intent: Lessons on running the goal-verified / goal-verified-treenav build loop.

skill-goal-verified-treenav.label: goal-verified-treenav arm
skill-goal-verified-treenav.blurb: The tree-nav recall arm of goal-verified: walk the topic taxonomy to pin the bar, gated by a trace-verified span check that makes skipping the recall leg a wall.
skill-goal-verified-treenav.intent: Lessons on running the goal-verified-treenav recall arm.

skill-playwright-screenshots.label: playwright-screenshots skill
skill-playwright-screenshots.blurb: Driving the regin web app headlessly and screenshotting it: stale-backend reuse, localStorage auth bypass, correct trace URLs, verifying DOM geometry over screenshot-guessing.
skill-playwright-screenshots.intent: Lessons on using the playwright-screenshots skill to verify WebUI changes.

skill-ui-ux.label: UI/UX skills
skill-ui-ux.blurb: Applying the ui-ux-* skill suite (principles, checklists, pro-max generator, regin surfaces) when building or reviewing frontend.
skill-ui-ux.intent: Lessons on using the UI/UX skill suite.

skill-topic-router.label: topic-router / recall skills
skill-topic-router.blurb: Routing a task through regin's pattern/topic index before editing, and the memory-tree-nav recall walk.
skill-topic-router.intent: Lessons on using topic-router and memory-tree-nav recall.

preferences.label: User preferences
preferences.blurb: Cross-cutting working-style preferences not tied to any code subsystem — communication, tooling, and workflow conventions the user has stated.
preferences.intent: The user's durable preferences and working-style conventions.

pref-workflow.label: Workflow preferences
pref-workflow.blurb: How the user wants work driven: decisiveness, verification discipline, library-vs-custom tradeoffs, plan/approve cadence.
pref-workflow.intent: Preferences about how to drive a task end-to-end.

pref-communication.label: Communication preferences
pref-communication.blurb: How the user wants to be addressed in updates: brevity, recommendation-not-survey, progress reporting, what to surface vs omit.
pref-communication.intent: Preferences about reporting and communication style.

pref-tooling.label: Tooling preferences
pref-tooling.blurb: Preferred tools, interpreters, and environment conventions (e.g. always the .venv interpreter, rtk proxy, curated MCP config).
